chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2726 of 2024 Muhammad Zubair Versus Security Exchange Commission of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For orders as to maintainability of petition..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 12.08.2024 Petitioner Muhammad Zubair present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Tariq Qureshi, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.2, which is taken on record. This petition seeks implementation of the order of Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan [SECP] that Pakistan Stock Exchange has not performed its functions as required. The petitioner is appearing in person; we have enquired as to how an order of the SECP could be implemented by an order of this Court of a Division Bench, the petitioner is unable to respond. We are afraid that we cannot be an executing court of the order of SECP. The law that concerns with the execution may be implemented in the letter and spirit by the authority concerned, especially in respect of the functions that concerned with Pakistan Stock Exchange. This being a situation, the petition is misconceived and is dismissed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
